step_rationale: m6A reader protein; regulates ferritinophagy gene expression in myocardial injury.
mechanism: YTHDF3 reads m6A methylation marks on ferritinophagy-related transcripts, modulating iron metabolism and oxidative stress in ischemic myocardium.

references.title: Multi-omics approach to personalised treatment: insights into thrombus-derived exosome regulation in cardiomyocyte ferritinophagy.
